name: OTP Verification
subject: Your One-Time Password (OTP) Code
useCase: Send a one-time password code for account verification or login confirmation.
description: A concise OTP email with a dominant code block, expiry note, and security warning.
author: TemplateForge
mjml: Your One-Time Password (OTP) Code Your OTP code is {{otp_code}}. It expires in {{expiry_minutes}} minutes. .link-nostyle { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; } .link-nostyle:hover { color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; } Verify Your Identity Hello {{first_name}}, Please use the following code to complete your verification: {{otp_code}} This code will expire in {{expiry_minutes}} minutes. If you did not request this code, please ignore this email or contact support immediately. For security reasons, never share your OTP code with anyone. For assistance, visit our Support Center.
text:
Your One-Time Password (OTP) Code
---------------------------------
Hello {{first_name}},

Please use the following code to complete your verification:

{{otp_code}}

This code will expire in {{expiry_minutes}} minutes.

If you did not request this code, please ignore this email or contact support immediately.

For security reasons, never share your OTP code with anyone. For assistance, visit our Support Center: {{support_url}}
